meaning: n.古代亚述及巴比伦之金字形神塔(顶上有神殿)
examples: Only the king and priests could enter a ziggurat.
We think he went off north to the Wailing Ziggurat.
The seventh layer of Mount Celestia can be reached only by climbing the ziggurat.
The new girl sat at the computer in the corner playing Ziggurat, Panic!
They convened in a white tent in the shadow of the restored remains of the ancient Ur ziggurat, or observatory.
